description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets CARGO_HOME to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo, caches the cargo/ directory, and runs a before_script that updates apt and installs libsodium-dev. Define a single build stage with two jobs: rust_nightly using the rustlang/rust:nightly image (allow_failure true) that runs rustc --version && cargo --version, then cargo build --verbose and cargo test --verbose; and rust_stable using the rust:latest image that runs the same three commands. Both jobs inherit the before_script and cache, and no artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
